sectionDesc: Open to roles in DPI/protocol advisory, ecosystem enablement, and impact-driven program leadership — across India and the Middle East.

lookingFor.title: What I'm looking for
lookingFor.paragraph1: Roles at the protocol/network layer where I can operationalise large-scale systemic change — not closed-loop implementations. Strong preference for ecosystem building, government program delivery, and impact measurement.
lookingFor.paragraph2: Open to relocation across India and the Middle East (prior Dubai experience). Available for DPI advisory, development sector consulting, and ecosystem enablement roles.
